name: TikTok Business
description: Access TikTok Business API to manage ad campaigns, ad groups, and performance reports.
author: OpenJiuwen
desc_mk:
## TikTok Business API

Manage TikTok advertising campaigns, ad groups, and access detailed performance reports through the TikTok Business API.

**Note:** Get your access token at [TikTok for Business](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/).

Authorization.description: TikTok Business API access token (Environment variable: TIKTOK_ACCESS_TOKEN)

tools.name: Get Campaigns
tools.description: Get a list of ad campaigns for an advertiser account.

advertiser_id.description: The ID of the advertiser account

campaign_ids.description: JSON array of campaign IDs to filter by (e.g. ["123","456"])

page_size.description: Number of results per page (default 10, max 1000)

tools.name: Create Campaign
tools.description: Create a new ad campaign for an advertiser account.

advertiser_id.description: The ID of the advertiser account

objective_type.description: Campaign objective: REACH, TRAFFIC, VIDEO_VIEWS, LEAD_GENERATION, APP_INSTALL, CONVERSIONS

budget.description: Campaign budget amount (required if budget_mode is not INFINITE)

tools.name: Get Ad Groups
tools.description: Get a list of ad groups for an advertiser account.

advertiser_id.description: The ID of the advertiser account

campaign_ids.description: JSON array of campaign IDs to filter ad groups by

adgroup_ids.description: JSON array of specific ad group IDs to retrieve

tools.name: Get Ads
tools.description: Get a list of ads for an advertiser account.

advertiser_id.description: The ID of the advertiser account

campaign_ids.description: JSON array of campaign IDs to filter by

adgroup_ids.description: JSON array of ad group IDs to filter by

ad_ids.description: JSON array of specific ad IDs to retrieve

tools.name: Get Integrated Report
tools.description: Get integrated performance reports for campaigns, ad groups, or ads.

advertiser_id.description: The ID of the advertiser account

report_type.description: Report type: BASIC, AUDIENCE, PLAYABLE_MATERIAL, CATALOG

data_level.description: Data aggregation level: AUCTION_ADVERTISER, AUCTION_CAMPAIGN, AUCTION_ADGROUP, AUCTION_AD

dimensions.description: JSON array of dimensions to group results by (e.g. ["campaign_id","stat_time_day"])

metrics.description: JSON array of metrics to retrieve (e.g. ["spend","impressions","clicks","ctr"])

start_date.description: Report start date in YYYY-MM-DD format

end_date.description: Report end date in YYYY-MM-DD format

tools.name: Get Audience Report
tools.description: Get audience demographic performance reports for your ads.

advertiser_id.description: The ID of the advertiser account

data_level.description: Data aggregation level: AUCTION_CAMPAIGN, AUCTION_ADGROUP, AUCTION_AD

metrics.description: JSON array of metrics to retrieve

start_date.description: Report start date in YYYY-MM-DD format

end_date.description: Report end date in YYYY-MM-DD format

tools.name: Get Account Info
tools.description: Get detailed information about one or more advertiser accounts.

advertiser_ids.description: JSON array of advertiser account IDs to retrieve (max 100)

fields.description: JSON array of fields to return (e.g. ["name","currency","timezone","balance"])
